headline: Is NiSource (NI) Priced Fairly After Strong Multi‑Year Share Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether NiSource at US$45.97 is offering fair value right now, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on what that price might imply. The stock has returned 2.1% over the last 7 days, while the 30 day return is a 2.8% decline, set against a 9.0% year to date gain and 18.3% return over the last year. Over a longer stretch, NiSource shows an 81.4% return across 3 years and 125.7% over 5 years, which gives important context when you think about what investors have...
